subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.27
question_html:
Which species are both Lewis and Brønsted–Lowry bases?

I.   CN−
II.  OH−
III. NH3


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
examiners_html: 45% of candidates chose all three species as Lewis and Brønsted-Lowry bases. The most commonly chosen distractor excluded CN-.
